name: Moom
description: Window manager — move, zoom, and snap windows with mouse or keyboard shortcuts

extraction.notes: Likely Sparkle feed URL. Verify by checking SUFeedURL in the app bundle's Info.plist. Many Tricks uses Sparkle for all their apps with consistent URL patterns.

changelog.notes: Release notes in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> or <description> within appcast item.

notes: Paid app (one-time purchase). Also available on Mac App Store (id419330170). Many Tricks uses Sparkle for direct-download versions of all their apps. The appcast URL pattern (/moom/appcast.xml) is the most likely but should be confirmed from the app bundle. Many Tricks is known for clean, consistent Sparkle feed setups.
